title: FetchError: request to https://api.monday.com/v2 failed reason: getaddrinfo ENOTFOUND api.monday.com
excerpt:
FetchError: request to https://api.monday.com/v2 failed reason: getaddrinfo ENOTFOUND api.monday.com 
how we can resolve this error. 
It comes while we deploy package on server monday request api doesn’t work ?
